revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Ohokutamano Shrine

Text replacement - "{{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei}}" to "{{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}}[[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]]"
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)

{{nihongo|'''Ohokutamano Shrine'''|大国玉神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Ohokutamano Shrine | native_name = 大国玉神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ohokutamano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.757746|129.727179}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Ohokutamano Shrine'''|大国玉神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Ohokutamano Shrine'''|大国玉神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Ohokutamano Shrine | native_name = 大国玉神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ohokutamano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.757746|129.727179}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Ohokutamano Shrine'''|大国玉神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iki Island]].
== instance of (P31) ==
